scope: Add layout field to QuestionAxisBlock and QuestionGeometryBlock schemas
Create admin UI for layout selector in AxisEditor and GeometryEditor
Update frontend renderers to apply selected layout
assumptions: Graph blocks are QuestionAxisBlock and QuestionGeometryBlock in Exercises collection
Layout will be a select field with 4 options: textAbove, textBelow, textLeft, textRight
Default layout should be 'textRight' (Text to the right, Graph to the left)
Layout needs to be enforced on mobile/landscape (no responsive stacking)
Need to modify: schemas.ts, types.ts, defaults.ts, admin editors, and frontend renderers
review_questions: Should the strict side-by-side on mobile be enforced even if it causes horizontal scrolling, or should there be a minimum width threshold?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 12 (modify 4+ files across schemas, types, admin UI, and frontend), Risk: 10 (non-critical schema change), Novelty: 8 (extending existing block pattern), Cross-Domain: 8 (backend + frontend + admin), Ambiguity: 2 (clear requirements), Dependencies: 5 (depends on existing block structure). Total: 45 → Complex+

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains ## Requirements with 4 layout options and ## Acceptance Criteria with 5 checkable items. The technical context clarifies the layout selector is an implementation detail. Promoted spec.md from requirements.
